mapper.select: SELECT id, option_name as optionName, area_category as areaCategory, area_range as areaRange, pattern_type as patternType, min_size_mm as minSizeMm, max_size_mm as maxSizeMm, description, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_options WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, option_name as optionName, area_category as areaCategory, area_range as areaRange, pattern_type as patternType, min_size_mm as minSizeMm, max_size_mm as maxSizeMm, description, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_options ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, option_name as optionName, area_category as areaCategory, area_range as areaRange, pattern_type as patternType, min_size_mm as minSizeMm, max_size_mm as maxSizeMm, description, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_options WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hot_stamping_patternx_area_options ( option_name, area_category, area_range, pattern_type, min_size_mm, max_size_mm, description, is_active, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{optionName}, #{areaCategory}, #{areaRange}, #{patternType}, #{minSizeMm}, #{maxSizeMm}, #{description}, #{isActive}, #{sortOrder}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE hot_stamping_patternx_area_options SET option_name = #{optionName}, area_category = #{areaCategory}, area_range = #{areaRange}, pattern_type = #{patternType}, min_size_mm = #{minSizeMm}, max_size_mm = #{maxSizeMm}, description = #{description}, is_active = #{isActive}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, option_name as optionName, area_category as areaCategory, area_range as areaRange, pattern_type as patternType, min_size_mm as minSizeMm, max_size_mm as maxSizeMm, description, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_options WHERE option_name = #{optionName} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, option_name as optionName, area_category as areaCategory, area_range as areaRange, pattern_type as patternType, min_size_mm as minSizeMm, max_size_mm as maxSizeMm, description, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_options WHERE pattern_type = #{patternType} LIMIT 1
